name: libx11-protocol-perl
title: libx11-protocol-perl
summary: Perl module for the X Window System Protocol, version 11
description:
Perl module for the X Window System Protocol, version 11
X11::Protocol is a client-side interface to the X11 Protocol (see X(1) for
information about X11), allowing perl programs to display windows and
graphics on X11 servers.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libx11-protocol-perl because Perl module for the X Window System Protocol, version 11.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libx11-protocol-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libx11-protocol-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libx11-protocol-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
